projectDescription: An interactive C# console application for Spanish speakers to learn English at A1–A2 level, featuring sentence generation, translation quizzes, verb conjugation tables, and short reading passages.
keyFeatures: Automatic sentence and question generation across 7 English verb tenses
Interactive translation quizzes with self-scored results
Verb conjugation reference tables for 153 regular and irregular verbs
Verb form quiz (past, participle, gerund) for both regular and irregular verbs
Full tense conjugation table for any verb across all 7 tenses
Short reading stories with bilingual (English/Spanish) support, filterable by CEFR level
Runtime custom vocabulary: add your own subjects, verbs, complements, places, and times
Semantic verb-complement matching to avoid nonsense sentences (e.g., never 'I drink a book')
Entirely Spanish-language UI for A1–A2 Spanish-speaking learners
Zero external dependencies — single .cs file, runs with dotnet run
publicApiSurface: ModeGenerate(SentenceMode mode) — generate N declarative sentences or questions
ModeQuiz(SentenceMode mode) — interactive translation quiz with score
ModeVerbList(bool regular) — display regular or irregular verb table
ModeVerbQuiz(bool regular) — quiz on verb forms (past/participle/gerund)
ModeTenseTable() — show all 7 tense conjugations for a given verb
ModeShortStories() — read short English stories, filter by level
ModeAddWords() — add custom subjects, verbs, complements, places, times at runtime
ModeListWords() — list all loaded vocabulary including custom additions
GenerateSentence(bool includePlace, bool includeTime, SentenceMode mode, Tense? forcedTense)
BuildEnglishVerb(string subject, string verb, Tense tense)
BuildSpanishVerb(string subject, string verb, Tense tense)
enum Tense { PresentSimple, PresentContinuous, PastSimple, PastContinuous, FutureSimple, PresentPerfect, Conditional }
class Word { English, Spanish, Category, Accepts }
class VerbEntry { Infinitive, Past, Participle, Gerund, SpanishInf, IsRegular }
class SpanishConj { YoPres, ElPres, NosPres, YoPast, ElPast, NosPast }
